assertions.title: Share on Social is responsive on mobile

steps.action: Open agent-browser session with viewport 375×667 and navigate to http://localhost:3000
steps.expected: Page loads and auto-redirects to game page with seed

steps.action: Click 5 squares in first row to achieve bingo using JS eval
steps.expected: Bingo detected, celebration active, Share on Social button appears
steps.observed: Bingo achieved, Share on Social button visible

steps.action: Take screenshot on mobile viewport during bingo
steps.expected: Button properly rendered, no horizontal overflow
steps.observed: Button rendered correctly, no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=375, innerWidth=375)

steps.expected: Button height at least 44px (touch target minimum)
steps.observed: Button dimensions: width=164px, height=46px, top=572.98, left=105.5, bottom=618.98, right=269.5

steps.action: Verify button is fully visible within viewport
steps.observed: Button fully visible within viewport, no clipping

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-SI-020 PASSED. The 'Share on Social' button on a 375×667 mobile viewport measures 164×46px, exceeding the 44×44px minimum touch target requirement (previously 42px, now 46px after fix). The button is fully visible within the viewport, causes no horizontal overflow, and no console errors were observed.
